description: Same catalog as synth_010 but tighter budget (6000). Budget forces trade-offs: ultra yandex-zigbee lamps (1800x2=3600) + aqara sensors (600x2) + hubs barely fits. Expected: enum_repair misses heterogeneous-within-lamp solution that brute force finds. H=2 solution on front but H=3 may not fit budget. Faster BF (~40s, same combo count) with more solutions filtered by budget.
